hypotheses.algorithm: Freeze 13 worksheet anchors, encode residual lookup, then charge exact anchor-pair set and anchor-label arrangement.
hypotheses.contradictions: Anchor labels/source are unpaid in the nominal model; explicit pair+label payment makes the full model worse than lookup.
hypotheses.coverage_pairs: 13 anchors plus residual lookup over 55 pairs
hypotheses.description_bits: 54.178 nominal reduction - 40.400 pair-set cost - 25.629 label-arrangement cost
hypotheses.explains_39_93_19_91: stores 19 and 39 as anchors; does not derive why 39 is missing, 93 present, or 19/91 conflict
hypotheses.negative_controls: nominal random-subset p=0.0014; explicit paid model not promoted

hypotheses.algorithm: Require a pre-row0 source that fixes pair/cell order before fitting labels.
hypotheses.contradictions: Any order chosen after seeing row0 is post-hoc and inadmissible.
hypotheses.negative_controls: not run because the source prerequisite is absent

hypotheses.algorithm: Use local workbook/script audit as artifact provenance; distinguish project reconstruction from CipSoft or in-game origin.
hypotheses.contradictions: 4 workbooks, 4 scripts, and 98 tracked paths trace local project layers but not pre-project/CipSoft origin.

hypotheses.algorithm: Treat row0 as a worksheet: freeze rare/surface/diagonal anchors, encode all remaining pair labels by lookup.
hypotheses.contradictions: A worksheet model is honest as provenance shape, but the chosen cells remain exogenous.
hypotheses.description_bits: 13 anchors reduce residual lookup from 160.521 to 106.343 before paying anchor costs
hypotheses.explains_39_93_19_91: captures 39/19 as declared anchors, not as a rule
hypotheses.negative_controls: paid-anchor gate rejects the explicit pair+label version; rare singletons only break even

hypotheses.algorithm: Fold 99 ordered codes to 55 unordered pairs, then keep an ordered-surface exception ledger for missing 39 and directed 19/91.
hypotheses.contradictions: It explains ordered-surface topology, not why labels I/N/N were assigned.
hypotheses.coverage_pairs: 54/55 pure unordered pairs plus one directed conflict
hypotheses.description_bits: small surface ledger; no pair-label generator
hypotheses.negative_controls: recent formula compatibility audit confirms book-formula gains do not derive these facts

hypotheses.algorithm: Quotient unordered pair cells by the fixed 6<->9 digit orbit and test whether orbit structure predicts labels.
hypotheses.contradictions: Mixed non-singleton orbits remain; the quotient does not assign all labels.
hypotheses.description_bits: quotient/orbit clue only; full label table still needs residual lookup
hypotheses.explains_39_93_19_91: partly touches 39/93 but does not explain the directed absence/conflict
hypotheses.negative_controls: fixed-swap control p=0.0152; weak signal, not full formula

hypotheses.algorithm: Declare diagonal cells as a family and assign E to the observed diagonal-E anchors.
hypotheses.contradictions: The family-supplied lower bound is ordinary under diagonal-family controls.
hypotheses.description_bits: positive only if the diagonal family is supplied; explicit pair costs are negative

hypotheses.algorithm: Best simple coordinate stump: numpad_le_1 -> E/N with leave-one-out scoring.
hypotheses.contradictions: Best stump accuracy is low and ordinary for the searched family.
hypotheses.description_bits: does not beat lookup; rule family searched and controlled

hypotheses.algorithm: Use fixed/frequency-driven pair placement plus symbol inventory, then test the same rule on held-out books.
hypotheses.contradictions: Train-selected order does not generalize; fixed orders top out at 8/55 observed hits.
hypotheses.description_bits: inventory/order rule only; no paid row0 formula
hypotheses.negative_controls: holdout control p=0.6614; fixed-order random control p=0.3337

hypotheses.algorithm: Ask whether the current 8154.676268-bit book formula predicts the row0 table rather than merely using it.
hypotheses.contradictions: The formula improves downstream book generation while assuming row0 as substrate.
hypotheses.negative_controls: compatibility gate has predicts_row0_labels_under_holdout=false and beats_row0_lookup_after_cost=false
